title: Support woolshed activities
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Support woolshed activities demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare materials, tools and equipment for woolshed activities

pcs.text: Identify the required materials, tools and equipment from provided lists and supervisor's instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the required materials, tools and equipment from provided lists and supervisor's instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the required materials, tools and equipment from provided lists and supervisor's instructions.

pcs.text: Check all materials, tools and equipment and inform supervisor if there are insufficient or faulty items
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check all materials, tools and equipment and inform supervisor if there are insufficient or faulty items?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check all materials, tools and equipment and inform supervisor if there are insufficient or faulty items.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use techniques when loading and unloading materials, tools and equipment that demonstrate correct manual handling and minimise damage to the load and the vehicle.

pcs.text: Select and use suitable personal protective equipment (PPE)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and use suitable personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and use suitable personal protective equipment (PPE).

pcs.text: Identify work health and safety (WHS), environmental and biosecurity hazards and inform supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify work health and safety (WHS), environmental and biosecurity hazards and inform supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work health and safety (WHS), environmental and biosecurity hazards and inform supervisor.
